# BETextInteraction

**Class**

An interaction you add to a text view to support extended text gestures.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor class BETextInteraction
```

## Overview

Add a `BETextInteraction` object to your browser text view’s [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInput/textInputView]. When your browser text view receives text-interaction actions, call the methods on this object to invoke the standard operating system behavior.

## Text selection

- **delegate**: A delegate object that the interaction notifies when the system changes the text selection.
- **BETextInteractionDelegate**: A set of methods that informs you about selection changes in text views.
- **textSelectionDisplayInteraction**: An interaction that manages the system’s text-selection UI.
- **selectionBoundaryAdjusted(to:touchPhase:flags:)**: Notifies the system after the text view adjusts its selection.
- **selectionChangedWithGesture(at:gesture:state:flags:)**: Notifies the system that the text view changed its selection.

## Menus

- **presentEditMenuForSelection()**: Presents an edit menu for the current text selection.
- **dismissEditMenuForSelection()**: Dismisses the edit menu for the current text selection.
- **contextMenuInteraction**: An interaction you use to work with the text view’s context menu.
- **contextMenuInteractionDelegate**: The delegate for the context menu interaction associated with this text interaction.

## Text replacements

- **addShortcut(forText:from:)**: Presents UI for a person to add a text-replacement shortcut to the keyboard dictionary.
- **showReplacements(forText:)**: Displays inline text replacements for the current selection.

## Sharing and defining text

- **share(text:from:)**: Presents standard UI for someone to share text from a browser text view.
- **showDictionary(forTextInContext:definingTextInRange:from:)**: Presents a dictionary definition for the supplied text.

## Translation and transliteration

- **translate(text:from:)**: Presents a translation of the text.
- **transliterateChinese(forText:)**: Converts the text between traditional and simplified Chinese.

## UI updates

- **editabilityChanged()**: Tells the system that the document’s editability status has changed.
- **refreshKeyboardUI()**: Tells the system to refresh the keyboard UI.

## Interaction responses

- **BETextInteractionDelegate**: A set of methods that informs you about selection changes in text views.
- **BEResponderEditActions**: A set of methods that defines extended interactions in browser text views.
- **BEGestureType**
- **BEResponderEditActions**: A set of methods that defines extended interactions in browser text views.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- UIInteraction
